HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd

HDFC Life Insur. Summary Chart Analysis Peers Quarters Profit & Loss Balance Sheet Cash Flow Ratios Investors Documents

HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd

₹ 568 -0.64%
03 Jul - close price
hdfclife.com BSE: 540777 NSE: HDFCLIFE
About

HDFC Life Insurance Company is engaged in carrying on the business of life insurance. The Company offers a range of individual and group insurance solutions. The portfolio comprises of various insurance and investment products such as Protection, Pension, Savings,(Source : 202003 Annual Report Page No: 175)

Key Points

Parentage
HDFC Bank, the promoter group, holds 50.25% stake as of Q2 FY26. As India’s largest private sector bank by balance sheet size, HBL and its subsidiaries offer a wide array of financial services, including non-banking financial services, insurance, asset management, and broking. [1] [2] [3]

Website BSE NSE
  • Market Cap ₹ 1,23,331 Cr.
  • Current Price ₹ 568
  • High / Low ₹ 815 / 543
  • Stock P/E 64.5
  • Book Value ₹ 82.3
  • Dividend Yield 0.37 %
  • ROCE 10.3 %
  • ROE 11.3 %
  • Face Value ₹ 10.0
Edit ratios

Pros

  • Company has been maintaining a healthy dividend payout of 25.3%

Cons

  • Stock is trading at 6.90 times its book value
  • The company has delivered a poor sales growth of 6.81% over past five years.
  • Tax rate seems low
  • Company has a low return on equity of 11.1% over last 3 years.

* The pros and cons are machine generated. Pros / cons are based on a checklist to highlight important points. Please exercise caution and do your own analysis.

* The classifications might have changed from Sep'2022 onwards. The new XBRL format added more details from Sep'22 onwards.

Classifications such as banks and foreign portfolio investors were not available earlier. The sudden changes in FII or DII can be because of these changes.

Click on the line-items to see the names of individual entities.

Documents

Announcements

All
  • Board Meeting Intimation for Approval Of Financial Results For The Quarter Ended June 30, 2026
    30 Jun - Board to approve Q1 FY27 standalone and consolidated results on July 15, 2026; trading window closed July 1-17.
  • Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015- GST Order
    30 Jun - Appeals order confirms GST demand, interest and penalty on Rs 132.7 crore for FY2017-2022; company will appeal.
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Newspaper Publication
    25 Jun - Please find attached file for further details
  • Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting (BRSR)
    24 Jun - HDFC Life filed its FY 2025-26 BRSR with reasonable assurance report on June 24, 2026.
  • Notice Of 26Th Annual General Meeting And Integrated Annual Report FY 2025-26.
    24 Jun - 26th AGM on July 16, 2026; dividend of ₹2.10 per share, director and auditor approvals.
